verses.latin_vulgate: Onus Moab.   Quia nocte vastata est  Ar Moab, conticuit ;  quia nocte vastatus est  murus Moab, conticuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשָּׂ֖א מוֹאָ֑ב כִּ֠י בְּלֵ֞יל שֻׁדַּ֨ד עָ֤ר מוֹאָב֙ נִדְמָ֔ה כִּ֗י בְּלֵ֛יל שֻׁדַּ֥ד קִיר־מוֹאָ֖ב נִדְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The burden of Moab. Because in the night Ar of Moab is laid waste, and brought to silence; because in the night Kir of Moab is laid waste, and brought to silence;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit domus,  et Dibon ad excelsa,  in planctum super Nabo ;  et super Medaba, Moab ululavit ;  in cunctis capitibus ejus calvitium,  et omnis barba radetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָלָ֨ה הַבַּ֧יִת וְדִיבֹ֛ן הַבָּמ֖וֹת לְבֶ֑כִי עַל־נְב֞וֹ וְעַ֤ל מֵֽידְבָא֙ מוֹאָ֣ב יְיֵלִ֔יל בְּכׇל־רֹאשָׁ֣יו קׇרְחָ֔ה כׇּל־זָקָ֖ן גְּרוּעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: He is gone up to Bajith, and to Dibon, the high places, to weep: Moab shall howl over Nebo, and over Medeba: on all their heads shall be baldness, and every beard cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: In triviis ejus accincti sunt sacco ;  super tecta ejus et in plateis ejus  omnis ululatus descendit in fletum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּחוּצֹתָ֖יו חָ֣גְרוּ שָׂ֑ק עַ֣ל גַּגּוֹתֶ֧יהָ וּבִרְחֹבֹתֶ֛יהָ כֻּלֹּ֥ה יְיֵלִ֖יל יֹרֵ֥ד בַּבֶּֽכִי׃
verses.king_james: In their streets they shall gird themselves with sackcloth: on the tops of their houses, and in their streets, every one shall howl, weeping abundantly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamabit Hesebon et Eleale,  usque Jasa audita est vox eorum ;  super hoc expediti Moab ululabunt,  anima ejus ululabit sibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּזְעַ֤ק חֶשְׁבּוֹן֙ וְאֶלְעָלֵ֔ה עַד־יַ֖הַץ נִשְׁמַ֣ע קוֹלָ֑ם עַל־כֵּ֗ן חֲלֻצֵ֤י מוֹאָב֙ יָרִ֔יעוּ נַפְשׁ֖וֹ יָ֥רְעָה לּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And Heshbon shall cry, and Elealeh: their voice shall be heard even unto Jahaz: therefore the armed soldiers of Moab shall cry out; his life shall be grievous unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cor meum ad Moab clamabit ;  vectes ejus usque ad Segor,  vitulam conternantem ;  per ascensum enim Luith  flens ascendet,  et in via Oronaim  clamorem contritionis levabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבִּי֙ לְמוֹאָ֣ב יִזְעָ֔ק בְּרִיחֶ֕הָ עַד־צֹ֖עַר עֶגְלַ֣ת שְׁלִשִׁיָּ֑ה כִּ֣י ׀ מַעֲלֵ֣ה הַלּוּחִ֗ית בִּבְכִי֙ יַֽעֲלֶה־בּ֔וֹ כִּ֚י דֶּ֣רֶךְ חוֹרֹנַ֔יִם זַעֲקַת־שֶׁ֖בֶר יְעֹעֵֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: My heart shall cry out for Moab; his fugitives shall flee unto Zoar, an heifer of three years old: for by the mounting up of Luhith with weeping shall they go it up; for in the way of Horonaim they shall raise up a cry of destruction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aquæ enim Nemrim desertæ erunt,  quia aruit herba, defecit germen,  viror omnis interiit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־מֵ֥י נִמְרִ֖ים מְשַׁמּ֣וֹת יִֽהְי֑וּ כִּֽי־יָבֵ֤שׁ חָצִיר֙ כָּ֣לָה דֶ֔שֶׁא יֶ֖רֶק לֹ֥א הָיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For the waters of Nimrim shall be desolate: for the hay is withered away, the grass faileth, there is no green thing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Secundum magnitudinem operis, et visitatio eorum :  ad torrentem Salicum ducent eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֖ן יִתְרָ֣ה עָשָׂ֑ה וּ֨פְקֻדָּתָ֔ם עַ֛ל נַ֥חַל הָעֲרָבִ֖ים יִשָּׂאֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore the abundance they have gotten, and that which they have laid up, shall they carry away to the brook of the willows.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam circuivit clamor terminum Moab ;  usque ad Gallim ululatus ejus,  et usque ad puteum Elim clamor ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־הִקִּ֥יפָה הַזְּעָקָ֖ה אֶת־גְּב֣וּל מוֹאָ֑ב עַד־אֶגְלַ֙יִם֙ יִלְלָתָ֔הּ וּבְאֵ֥ר אֵילִ֖ים יִלְלָתָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: For the cry is gone round about the borders of Moab; the howling thereof unto Eglaim, and the howling thereof unto Beer–elim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia aquæ Dibon repletæ sunt sanguine ;  ponam enim super Dibon additamenta ;  his qui fugerint de Moab leonem,  et reliquiis terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י מֵ֤י דִימוֹן֙ מָ֣לְאוּ דָ֔ם כִּֽי־אָשִׁ֥ית עַל־דִּימ֖וֹן נוֹסָפ֑וֹת לִפְלֵיטַ֤ת מוֹאָב֙ אַרְיֵ֔ה וְלִשְׁאֵרִ֖ית אֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For the waters of Dimon shall be full of blood: for I will bring more upon Dimon, lions upon him that escapeth of Moab, and upon the remnant of the land.
